allow: PowerShell(dotnet sln server/ShvaTransactionSimulator.sln add server/Shva.TransactionSimulator.Api server/Shva.TransactionSimulator.Tests)
PowerShell(dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate --project server/Shva.TransactionSimulator.Api)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "{0}  PID={1}  {2}" -f $_.LocalAddress, $_.OwningProcess, $p.ProcessName })

PowerShell(docker exec shva-db-1 /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -C -S localhost -U sa -P 'Shva_Local_Dev_Pa55!' -d ShvaTransactionSimulator -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT RegionName, CONVERT\(varchar\(5\),LocalTime\) AS LocalTime, Status FROM Transactions ORDER BY CreatedAtUtc;")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:8080/' -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\); has #root div: $\($r.Content -match 'id=\\"root\\"'\); has bundle: $\($r.Content -match 'src=\\"/assets/'\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content README.md -Raw\) -replace '\(?s\)\\| Id   \\| Region.*?\\n\\nUSA is deliberately split.*?local time\\.', '| Id   | Region  | IANA Time Zone      |\\n|------|---------|---------------------|\\n| IL   | Israel  | Asia/Jerusalem      |\\n| FR   | France  | Europe/Paris        |\\n| CY   | Cyprus  | Asia/Nicosia        |\\n| IT   | Italy   | Europe/Rome         |\\n| JP   | Japan   | Asia/Tokyo          |\\n| US   | USA     | America/New_York    |' | Set-Content README.md")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\npm.cmd","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)

PowerShell($found = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Filter "npm.cmd" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \($found\) { $found } else { "none in common dirs" }; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)

PowerShell($d = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { Write-Output "docker -> $\($d.Source\)"; docker version --format '{{.Server.Version}}' 2>$null; if \($?\) { Write-Output 'DAEMON: running' } else { Write-Output 'DAEMON: not running' } } else { Write-Output 'docker not found' })

PowerShell($pub = "c:\\HA\\Shva\\client\\public"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $pub\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $pub | Out-Null; Write-Output "Created: $pub" } else { Write-Output "Exists: $pub" }; Get-ChildItem $pub -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell($env:CI="1"; Set-Location "c:\\HA\\Shva\\client"; if \(-not \(Test-Path node_modules\)\) { npm ci } ; npm run build)
